overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player moves from a main street under an elevated highway into a narrow alley decorated with hanging lanterns and cherry blossoms, finally emerging into a small plaza. The scene features dense cyberpunk architecture with vibrant neon signage and atmospheric haze.

events.description: car with bright headlights passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing yellow construction barriers

notable_agents.action: sedan driving past with headlights illuminating the wet pavement

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure arching overhead with support pillars
multi-story building with illuminated windows and neon signage
bright yellow construction barriers lining the sidewalk edge
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along a main city street beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. The street is lined with neon-lit buildings and yellow construction barriers. Vehicles occasionally pass by on the road to the right, their headlights cutting through the night haze.

events.description: turns left from main street into a narrow alleyway with construction scaffolding

agents.ego_description: turning left into a narrow passage between buildings, moving away from the main street traffic

entered.detail: metal scaffolding with wooden planks and construction materials
older building with wooden elements and signage with asian characters
narrow opening between buildings leading deeper into the block

segments.scene_description: Turning left from the bustling main street into a narrower alleyway. Construction scaffolding lines the left side while the passage narrows between mixed architectural styles, transitioning from the open highway underpass to an enclosed urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit alley with hanging lanterns and cherry blossoms

events.description: alley becomes densely decorated with hanging red lanterns and illuminated cherry blossom trees overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow neon alley, observing the hanging lanterns and cherry blossoms overhead

notable_agents.action: figure standing near a shop entrance at the end of the alley

entered.detail: traditional red and white paper lanterns suspended across the alley ceiling
tree with pink illuminated blossoms creating a canopy over the path
brightly lit vending machine with green neon trim and advertisements

segments.scene_description: Proceeding deeper into the narrow alleyway, now densely decorated with hanging red and white paper lanterns and illuminated cherry blossom trees creating a canopy of pink light. The walls are lined with closed shop shutters and glowing vending machines, creating an intimate neon corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: small plaza with seating and central cherry tree

events.description: alley opens into a small plaza with concrete seating and a large central cherry tree

agents.ego_description: emerging into the open plaza, looking around the seating area and upward at the surrounding buildings

entered.detail: concrete block benches and tiered seating platforms arranged around the space
multi-story building with external metal staircases and balconies
break in the overhead structures revealing the night sky above

segments.scene_description: The alley opens into a small urban plaza featuring concrete seating blocks and a large illuminated cherry tree at its center. The space is surrounded by multi-story buildings with external staircases, transitioning from the enclosed lantern-lit passage to a more open semi-covered courtyard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sprawling, industrial city thoroughfare into a secluded, neon-lit urban sanctuary. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, moving past yellow construction barriers and neon buildings as vehicle headlights pierce through the nighttime haze. As the camera turns left, the open scale of the main street shifts into a narrowing urban corridor lined with construction scaffolding. The scene then transforms into an intimate passage densely decorated with glowing vending machines and a canopy of red and white paper lanterns intertwined with illuminated cherry blossoms. Finally, the enclosed alleyway opens into a small concrete plaza centered around a large, glowing cherry tree and surrounded by multi-story buildings with external staircases.
